metrics.name: visibility
metrics.detail: 27% of sampled frames have usable body landmarks.

metrics.name: ready_posture
metrics.detail: Opening posture uses knee bend and torso balance proxies.

metrics.name: backswing
metrics.detail: Wrist travel before contact estimates preparation range.

metrics.name: contact_position
metrics.detail: Contact estimate checks lead wrist position relative to torso.

metrics.name: follow_through
metrics.detail: Wrist continuation after contact estimates follow-through.

metrics.name: shoulder_hip_separation
metrics.detail: Shoulder and hip line angle difference estimates rotation.

feedback: Player visibility is limited. Re-record with the full body in frame from preparation through follow-through.
Continue the swing after contact instead of stopping the racket path early.
Show more forward weight transfer through the shot while keeping balance.
These notes are heuristic estimates from pose landmarks and are not a biomechanical diagnosis.
